hero.title: Master PCM with Confidence
hero.subtitle: From Class 8 to Degree level, we simplify Maths, Physics, and Chemistry with clear concepts, step-by-step methods, and exam-focused preparation.

preview.title: Understanding beats memorizing.
preview.description: We focus on deep understanding rather than rote learning. Each concept is broken down into simple steps so students can solve problems independently and perform confidently in exams.

courses.title: High School (9th & 10th)
courses.description: CBSE & State syllabus coverage for Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry.

courses.title: Higher Secondary (11th & 12th)
courses.description: In-depth guidance for board exams with a focus on core science and maths subjects.

courses.title: Degree Level Maths
courses.description: Simplified explanations for complex higher-education mathematical concepts.

courses.title: Doubt Clearance & Support
courses.description: One-to-one classes and personal attention to ensure no student is left behind.

reviews.name: Anjali S
reviews.text: Maths became so easy after joining. Concepts are explained clearly and I scored much better in exams.

reviews.name: Rahul K
reviews.text: Difficult problems are broken down step by step. Helped me gain confidence in Maths.

reviews.name: Fathima P
reviews.text: Very structured teaching. My child improved a lot in both understanding and marks.
